scope: U.S. Anheuser-Busch facilities footprint referenced by the flagship AB InBev microsite.
summary: Anheuser-Busch states that it maintains 100 facilities across the country, which aligns with the flagship AB InBev network framing already used in the microsite.

scope: Coca-Cola Consolidated's disclosed 70-site footprint used as the conservative lower bound for the flagship Coca-Cola system scenario.
summary: Coca-Cola Consolidated disclosed 60 distribution centers and 10 manufacturing plants in its 2025 10-K, giving the flagship Coca-Cola system model an official 70-site lower bound before any additional bottler sites are added.

scope: Danone North America production locations listed on the official company overview page.
summary: Danone North America states that it operates 13 production locations, replacing the earlier 15-plus placeholder in the Dannon flagship microsite.

scope: North America manufacturing plus distribution footprint disclosed in Frito-Lay's official company facts sheet.
summary: Frito-Lay states that it has 30-plus manufacturing facilities across the U.S. and Canada and 200-plus distribution centers, supporting a conservative 230-plus site lower bound for the flagship network scenario.

scope: General Mills owned-plant footprint used as the conservative lower bound for the flagship General Mills scenario.
summary: General Mills' 2025 Global Responsibility Report says the company has 41 owned plants around the world, replacing the earlier third-party 50-plus placeholder with an official lower bound.

sources.label: General Mills how we make it
